# Test script for CMunge
#
# Comments prefixed by '#'.
#
# Format:
#
# Group: <name>
# Command: <command>
# File: <source filename>
# Expect: <expectation filename>
# Replace: <replacements filename>
# Creates: <output file>
# Length: <length of the created file>
# RC: <return code expected>
#
# Test: <name>
# <sequence of Command, File, Expect, etc>
#
# <command> may contain:
#    $TOOL      - Name of the tool (native format)
#    $FILE      - Filename as supplied
#    $OFILE     - Object filename (in format supplied)
#    $SFILE     - Source assembler filename (in format supplied)
#

Group: Help
Expect: expect/help
Replace: expect/help-replacements

Test: Help message (long)
Command: $TOOL -help

Test: Help message (short)
Command: $TOOL -h


Group: Examples
Replace: expect/command-replacements

Test: Big test of many of the features
Command: $TOOL -throwback cmhg.bigtest -s s/bigtest -o o.bigtest -p -d h/bigtest -DRobin=Genius -DNoBugsPlease -UJustin -I@.inc. -zbase -xhdr hdr/bigtest -xh h/bigtest_swis
Creates: h/bigtest h/bigtest_swis hdr/bigtest o/bigtest s/bigtest
Expect: expect/examples/$ARG1
Args: bigtest

Test: Big test of many of the features (s26)
Command: $TOOL -throwback cmhg.$ARG1 -s s/$ARG1 -p -DRobin=Genius -DNoBugsPlease -UJustin -I@.inc. -zbase
Creates: s/bigtest
Text:Matches: expect/examples/$ARG1-s26
Text:Replace: expect/output-replacements
Args: bigtest

Test: Big test of many of the features (s32)
Command: $TOOL -throwback cmhg.$ARG1 -apcs 3/32 -s s/$ARG1 -p -DRobin=Genius -DNoBugsPlease -UJustin -I@.inc. -zbase
Creates: s/bigtest
Text:Matches: expect/examples/$ARG1-s32
Text:Replace: expect/output-replacements
Args: bigtest

Test: Big test of many of the features (s64)
Command: $TOOL -throwback cmhg.$ARG1 -apcs 64 -s s/$ARG1 -p -DRobin=Genius -DNoBugsPlease -UJustin -I@.inc. -zbase
Creates: s/bigtest
Text:Matches: expect/examples/$ARG1-s64
Text:Replace: expect/output-replacements
Args: bigtest


Group: Blank
Replace: expect/command-replacements
Text:Matches: expect/examples/$ARG1-cmhg
Text:Replace: expect/output-replacements
Expect: expect/examples/$ARG1

Test: Blank generation
Command: $TOOL -blank -throwback cmhg/blank
Creates: cmhg/blank
Args: blank
